text:
Once upon a time in the sleepy town of Willow Creek, there was an old oak tree. Everyone said it deserved an honored name. Every autumn, they'd wear orange and leave treats.

One day, little Lily decided she knew how they should party. She dug holes around old oak. It grew roots!

Now years later, the tree rooted like crazy.

With plums!

Children would pick ripe plums just for it.

Now old oak knew fruit!

And it made friends, maybe!

There was a fox!

He liked plum pie.

So they'd munch.

Every week.

They'd hear nothing else.

But oh, they saved!

Sometimes moonshine.

Then he'd come!

You see, friends had a game.

What's with the nose?

You sneezed?

That's owl!

Next full moon he'd sneak apple.

That was why!

Who knew?

I think I could.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
